Products & Services

What We Manufacture

Custom bags, eco-friendly options, corporate gifting items, and utility products — all manufactured in bulk with full customization support.

Product Category 01

Custom Bags

Designed for bulk production with custom branding. Travel, duffle, laptop, school, drawstring, and promotional bags.

Bag Types

  • Travel bags
  • Duffle bags
  • Laptop bags
  • School bags
  • Drawstring bags
  • Promotional bags

Best Suited For

  • Corporate employee kits and welcome packages
  • Event and promotional campaigns
  • Distributor and wholesale supply
  • Institutional requirements (schools, colleges)
Product Category 02

Jute & Cotton Eco Bags

Eco-friendly bags suitable for corporate gifting and sustainable branding initiatives.

Jute bags

Cotton tote bags

Eco-friendly promotional bags

Reusable shopping bags

Product Category 03

Corporate Gifting Items

Office stationery, corporate kits, and promotional combinations built for events, employee kits, and branding.

Office stationery (non-kid)

Corporate kits

Promotional combinations

Employee onboarding kits

Product Category 04

Utility Products

Daily-use branded items for bulk gifting and promotional campaigns.

Water bottles

Daily-use branded items

Combo gift sets

Custom Manufacturing

What Can Be Customized

Most of our work involves customization based on business requirements. Logo to complete design — your specs, our execution.

Logo Printing & Branding

Screen printing, embroidery, heat transfer, and more. Your brand, prominently displayed.

Size & Dimensions

Custom sizing to fit your specific use case. Standard and non-standard dimensions available.

Material Selection

Canvas, nylon, polyester, jute, cotton, leatherette — choose what fits your brand and budget.

Color Combinations

Match your brand colors precisely. We work with Pantone references and custom color specifications.

Packaging & Finishing

Individual poly bags, custom boxes, branded tags, hang tags — packaging that matches your standards.

Order Types

Types of Orders We Handle

Fully Custom-Designed

Bags designed from scratch to your specifications. Material, size, structure, branding — all custom.

Standard + Branding

Choose from our standard designs, add your logo and branding. Faster turnaround, lower setup cost.

Corporate-Specific

Tailored solutions for corporate requirements — employee kits, event packages, branded combinations.

Need Something Specific?

Share your product requirements and we'll discuss options, materials, and pricing.

Discuss Your Requirement See How Orders Work
LEGEND INDUSTRIES

Hyderabad-based bag manufacturing and corporate gifting since 1998. Bulk production, custom branding, PAN India supply.
